author: va8e
content: Plan: Convert single crate to Cargo workspace with two members: crates/crossbridge (existing binary) and crates/crossbridge-protocol (new library). Protocol crate defines message types (Request, Response, StatusUpdate) matching the existing label protocol, serialized with postcard. Framing helpers implement length-prefixed (u32 LE) framing. Binary crate gains dependency on protocol crate. Nix packaging updated for workspace layout.
